Name:
Julia Wolf - BIG DOG [V1]
(prod. Scro)
(DOG HOUSE, DOGHOUSE, DØGHOUSE)
Notes:
Tabs for the original "BIG DOG" demo by Julia Wolf for "DOG HOUSE" with Drake and Yeat. Shared by Scro via Patreon on September 9, 2025, captioned:

"watsup yall. this was quite crazy to find out that i played guitar for a drake song AND a yeat song in one go haha

i send demos and guitar loops to julia all the time and this just happened to be one of the demo songs she sent over to drake when they were talking about collabing. everything after that they just cooked it up. i think rest of the track is produced by BNYX

anyways hope u dig, thanks"
